hyperedges.label: Pipeline 7-step orchestration
hyperedges.note: All five agent functions are orchestrated sequentially by run_pipeline as named steps in the Narada pipeline

hyperedges.label: LLM JSON parsing pattern shared across agents
hyperedges.note: All three agents implement nearly identical LLM JSON parsing: strip think tags, strip markdown fences, json.loads

hyperedges.label: API key flow: sessionStorage to request headers to Settings
hyperedges.note: Keys flow from sessionStorage through Sidebar UI into buildHeaders which maps them to x- headers consumed by _build_settings_from_headers to produce a per-request Settings override

hyperedges.label: All LLM providers implement BaseLLMProvider and are instantiated by _build_llm
All search providers implement BaseSearchProvider and are instantiated by get_search_provider
Per-step factory functions all call _build_llm and _get_step_model_override to resolve provider+model

hyperedges.label: Pipeline 7-step orchestration
hyperedges.note: All five agent functions are orchestrated sequentially by run_pipeline as named steps in the Narada pipeline

hyperedges.label: LLM JSON parsing pattern shared across agents
hyperedges.note: All three agents implement nearly identical LLM JSON parsing: strip think tags, strip markdown fences, json.loads

hyperedges.label: API key flow: sessionStorage to request headers to Settings
hyperedges.note: Keys flow from sessionStorage through Sidebar UI into buildHeaders which maps them to x- headers consumed by _build_settings_from_headers to produce a per-request Settings override

hyperedges.label: All LLM providers implement BaseLLMProvider and are instantiated by _build_llm
All search providers implement BaseSearchProvider and are instantiated by get_search_provider
Per-step factory functions all call _build_llm and _get_step_model_override to resolve provider+model
